dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3789 IS: Prospectus Modernization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Ernst introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works

form.official-title: To provide for a temporary adjustment to the prospectus thresholds for certain General Services Administration projects, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Prospectus Modernization Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, for fiscal years 2026 through 2028, section 3307(a) of title 40, United States Code, shall be applied—

paragraph.text: by substituting $10,000,000 for $1,500,000 in each of paragraphs (1) and (2) of that section; and
by substituting $5,000,000 for $750,000 in paragraph (3) of that section.

subsection.text: For purposes of fiscal years 2026 through 2028, section 3307(h) of title 40, United States Code, shall not apply to the amounts substituted under subsection (a).
